---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Architecture: [e.g. x64, arm64]
- Postly version: [e.g. 0.2.0]

## Logs / Screenshots
Open DevTools (`Ctrl+Shift+I` / `Cmd+Option+I`) and paste any relevant errors.
